title: Remington RX7 Electric Head Shaver for Bald Men (Cordless, 60-Min Usage, USB, 5 Cutting Heads Skin Close Results (0.2mm), Turbo, Wet & Dry, Easy Clean, Waterproof, Pop-up Trimmer, Travel Pouch) XR1600
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 5x Cutting Heads - With 30 percent Increased flex (vs predecessor XR1500) for maximum contact and skin close results (0.2mm)
You won’t need to go over the same area more repeatedly and you could shave your whole head in less than 2 minutes (based on two days growth - 1mm)
Cordless with USB Charging - For simple, convenient, worldwide charging with up to 60 minutes runtime
Easy Cleaning - 100 percent waterproof and a less-mess hair pocket to collect trimmings
2 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee - Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online within 28 days
description: Product Description Embrace the trend for a perfectly shaved head or tidy up your existing style with the Ultimate Series RX7 Head Shaver. The RX7 has everything you need for effortless, comfortable head shaving. 5x Cutting Heads offer 30% more flex* for maximum contact and quick results. While Dual Track Blades shave hair to as short as 0.2mm the Turbo Speed Function is designed to tackle denser hair growth for an even all-over finish. The Ultimate Series RX7 Head Shaver can get the job done in less than 2 minutes*** so with up to 60 minutes’ usage time, that's over a month** of head shaving from a single charge. With Flexing Blades, a Pop-Up Trimmer and an LED countdown so you can see how much charge is left, it’s never been easier to stay on top of your style. * Vs predecessor XR1500 **based on two days growth (1mm) ***Based on 3 minutes usage every 2 days Safety Warning Always keep the shaver away from water while in use. Do not use the shaver while charging.
